scripts.dev: concurrently -n public,admin -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @hbc/public" "npm run dev -w @hbc/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @hbc/shared && npm run build -w @hbc/public && npm run build -w @hbc/admin
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply human-bug-center-db --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --config apps/public/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:public: npm run build -w @hbc/public && wrangler deploy --config apps/public/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:admin: npm run build -w @hbc/admin && wrangler deploy --config apps/admin/wrangler.jsonc
